case_title: FLORES, MARCO vs. TOTAH, KAMEL ISSA AN INDIVIDUAL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, MARCO AS TO DEFENDANT TOTAH, KAMEL ISSA AN INDIVIDUAL & DBA KAMELINDA ELECTRIC AND CONSTRUCTION
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
